paper_focus.title: On the anisotropic deformation behavior of a low-density medium manganese steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the anisotropic tensile deformation mechanisms of a low-density medium Mn steel, focusing on the influence of loading direction on strain partitioning among coexisting phases and the resultant strain-induced martensitic transformation kinetics.
material_systems: low-density medium Mn steel with Al addition
phases: δ-ferrite, α-ferrite, retained austenite (γ), strain-induced martensite
main_process_variables: tensile loading direction (rolling direction RD, transverse direction TD)
